summary: MHCGED full-stack testing complete. Backend: 16/16 pytest tests passed (auth, dashboard, folders CRUD, users CRUD with role enforcement, documents upload/list/download/update/archive/share, tags, activity, logout). Frontend: login works, dashboard renders with stats, sidebar navigation to Dashboard/Documents/Folders/Archives/Activity/Agents works, modals open. Core flows functional. Several data-testid attributes are missing per spec which reduced deep UI flow validation but did not indicate functional regressions.

missing_testids.note: Archives link is rendered in sidebar but lacks the data-testid='nav-archives' attribute expected by the spec
Upload button on Documents page lacks data-testid='upload-btn'
Folder creation modal inputs lack data-testid attributes
Only agent-submit has a testid; other inputs don't, preventing deterministic UI automation

action_items: Add missing data-testid attributes: nav-archives, upload-btn, folder-name-input, folder-submit, agent-email-input, agent-name-input, agent-password-input to ensure full UI automation coverage as specified
Note: Login redirects to '/' (root) after success instead of '/dashboard'. This is cosmetic since the dashboard is rendered at root. Decide whether to align URL to '/dashboard' or update spec.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') - should migrate to lifespan context manager.
Folders endpoint projects out _id via find({}, {_id:0}) but create_folder returns dict after insert_one which may still contain _id; current code pops _id before return which is fine.
Users are stored with Mongo ObjectId (_id) while folders/documents use uuid 'id'. Mixed identifier strategy is acceptable but inconsistent; requires ObjectId validation every time (done correctly).
storage.py uses synchronous requests inside async handlers - file upload/download will block the event loop. For production concurrency consider httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_threadpool.

CORS uses allow_origins from env AND allow_origin_regex='.*' together with allow_credentials=True. The regex effectively allows any origin which is overly permissive with credentialed cookies. Tighten to explicit origins for production.
Auto-archive threshold uses isoformat() string comparison on created_at; string-sort works because all timestamps are UTC isoformat, but a Date type field would be more robust.
No pagination on list_documents / list_folders / list_users / list_activity (activity limited to 100). Will degrade at scale.
document delete is soft-delete but there is no endpoint/cron to purge truly deleted files from object storage (storage leak over time).

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (navigation/auth/dashboard verified; CRUD UI forms could not be fully exercised due to missing testids)

test_credentials: admin@mhcged.cg / Admin@2026 (seeded on startup, verified working)
seed_data_creation: Test run created 1 folder (UITest_*) via UI attempt and 1 agent via backend tests (auto-cleaned by fixtures). A residual folder may remain from incomplete UI modal attempt.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid (16/16). The pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py covers full API surface with create→verify patterns. If re-running after frontend testid additions, use the existing Playwright patterns to test upload flow end-to-end (file upload + list refresh) and agent CRUD (create, toggle active, delete). Login redirects to '/' not '/dashboard'.
rca_of_the_issue: No functional issue found. The only gap is missing data-testid attributes in some frontend components which the problem statement explicitly listed.
